name: excel-mcp-server-reference
description: Standalone-first reference plugin for wrapping Excel MCP Server workbook automation as reusable skills.

skills.name: readWorkbookRange
skills.description: Read values from a worksheet range through Excel MCP Server.

skills.name: writeWorkbookRange
skills.description: Write values into a worksheet range through Excel MCP Server.

skills.name: runWorkbookFormula
skills.description: Execute an Excel formula and return the calculated result.

skills.name: createPivotTable
skills.description: Create and configure a pivot table from workbook data.

skills.name: refreshWorkbook
skills.description: Refresh workbook calculations, queries, or linked data before downstream automation.
